title: TeamErrorFix
description: A mod to fix the player either on another team or not on any team error
body:
Fix for an error that is happening whenever there is a team change.

Made the mod because I had issues in replay mod and the server I play at have AFK system and whenever there is a team change the replay mod crashed at that point.


Example title of the error:
```
java.lang.IllegalStateException: Player is either on another team or not on any team. Cannot remove from team 'AFK'.
```


I saw a mod for 1.20.4 but not for newer versions. The mod: [https://modrinth.com/mod/cannot-remove-from-team-workaround](https://modrinth.com/mod/cannot-remove-from-team-workaround)
